decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to your opponent by casting efficient, low-cost spells and creatures. By utilizing cards like Lightning Bolt, Ball Lightning, and Grim Lavamancer, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and force the opponent to react defensively. The inclusion of Sulfuric Vortex helps to maintain a steady stream of damage, while Fireblast serves as a powerful finisher. With a low mana curve and aggressive mindset, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through disruption and resource denial while utilizing Oath of Druids as a win condition. By using cards like Seal of Cleansing and Swords to Plowshares for removal, along with cards like Sphere of Resistance to slow down opponents, this deck aims to set up an Oath of Druids activation to put powerful creatures like Terravore onto the battlefield. Cataclysm can also help reset the board in your favor. The mana base is designed to support the control elements and enable the deck to function smoothly.

The deck focuses on putting constant pressure on the opponent by playing low cost, efficient creatures and burn spells. By emptying your hand quickly and dealing direct damage to the opponent, the goal is to win the game as fast as possible before the opponent can stabilize. The deck also utilizes land destruction and repeatable burn effects to disrupt the opponent's game plan and keep them on the defensive. Overall, this strategy aims to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of aggressive creatures and direct damage spells.

This deck focuses on fast, explosive combos using Phyrexian Dreadnought, Stifle, and various card draw spells to find and protect the combo pieces. By stalling opponents with counterspells and tempo plays, the deck aims to assemble the Dreadnought-Stifle combo to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes cards like Portent and Impulse to dig for combo pieces and disrupt opponents' strategies. Overall, the deck's strategy revolves around efficiently assembling its combo while controlling the game and disrupting opponents' plans.

The main concept of this deck is to create a powerful enchantment-based combo using cards like Opalescence, Parallax Wave, and Replenish. By leveraging the Enchantress cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence, the deck aims to draw cards and generate mana to fuel its combo pieces. With access to cards like Mirri's Guile and Sterling Grove for card selection and protection, and the ability to control the board with cards like Seal of Cleansing and Swords to Plowshares, this deck focuses on creating a strong enchantment engine to overwhelm opponents.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat on the board while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and bounce spells like Boomerang. The deck aims to control the game through card advantage with draw spells like Gush and Portent, while also having the flexibility to protect its combo pieces with cards like Misdirection and Foil. A well-timed Stifle can often lock out the opponent from playing their spells effectively, leading to a swift victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing the synergy between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to cheat a powerful creature onto the battlefield while denying opponents' resources. The deck also includes various card draw spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Impulse to maintain card advantage. Counterspells like Foil and Thwart are used to protect the combo, while Vision Charm and Portent provide additional card selection. Mishra's Factory and Daze offer additional utility and disruption options. The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo and control the game until victory.

The deck focuses on filling up the graveyard with cards like Zombie Infestation and Squee, Goblin Nabob to fuel powerful graveyard interactions, while using counterspells and discard spells like Duress to control the game and protect key pieces. Utilizing cards like Psychatog and Wonder, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through careful resource management and strategic play. The deck also includes efficient card draw and bounce spells like Gush and Chain of Vapor to maintain card advantage and disrupt opponent's strategies.

The deck is focused on using the card Replenish to bring back powerful enchantments from the graveyard, such as Opalescence and Parallax Wave. This creates a powerful board presence and allows for potential combos with cards like Parallax Tide. The deck also includes control elements like Mana Leak and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt opponents' strategies. Overall, the goal is to quickly assemble a strong enchantment-based board state and overwhelm the opponent before they can react effectively.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Madness mechanic to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while also maintaining card advantage through discarding and reusing cards efficiently. The deck's key strategy is to continuously dump cards with Madness into the graveyard, enabling powerful plays with cards like Circular Logic and Arrogant Wurm. Survival of the Fittest serves as a versatile tool for finding key creatures, while counter spells like Mana Leak and Daze provide some defensive options. The deck aims to apply constant pressure and outvalue the opponent with efficient card interactions.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly reduce the opponent's life total by playing aggressively with low-cost, efficient creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to deal damage as quickly as possible, using cards like Lightning Bolt, Incinerate, and Fireblast to remove threats and push through damage to end the game swiftly. Additionally, cards like Cursed Scroll and Sulfuric Vortex provide additional reach and damage over time. Overall, this deck prioritizes speed and damage output to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures such as Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Verdant Force, and then using spells like Reanimate and Exhume to bring them back into play for a strong and fast win condition. Cabal Therapy and Duress help disrupt the opponent's game plan while cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual help to accelerate the combo. The mana base is built around fixing colors for the reanimation spells and includes Undiscovered Paradise and Gemstone Mine for additional mana ramp.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive and fast-paced creature and burn spells. By consistently dealing damage to the opponent's life total and attacking relentlessly, the goal is to close out the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize. The deck relies on a combination of cheap creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup, burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, and enchantments like Sulfuric Vortex to apply constant pressure and prevent the opponent from gaining control of the game.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible through a combination of low-cost creatures and burn spells. By utilizing efficient creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup alongside powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, this deck aims to apply pressure on the opponent early in the game. Cards like Cursed Scroll and Sulfuric Vortex provide additional reach to close out games quickly, while Grim Lavamancer and Fireblast offer additional late-game damage potential to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the card Fluctuator to reduce the cycling cost of your cards to zero, allowing you to draw through your deck quickly and find your win condition combo pieces. By cycling through your deck with cards like Drifting Djinn, Primoc Escapee, and Cloud of Faeries, you can generate mana and create a large board presence to overwhelm your opponent. The combination of efficient cycling, card draw, and powerful combo pieces makes this deck a potent threat in the Premodern 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the combo of Opalescence and Replenish to bring back enchantments such as Parallax Wave and Parallax Tide from the graveyard, creating a powerful board presence. Other cards like Attunement and Frantic Search help dig for combo pieces, while disruption spells like Mana Leak and Swords to Plowshares help control the game. Tsabo's Web can shut down opponent's mana sources, while Seal of Cleansing provides additional removal. Overall, this deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with enchantment-based threats.
